arts.ttl: Mee fit to return for Brentford
arts.sum: Ben Mee has been passed fit to return to the Brentford squad. The defender, 35, has not featured since going off injured during the goalless draw at Brighton on 27 December. But he will be in the squad for Tuesday’s match against Manchester City, as will Rico Henry. arts.sum: Manchester City will reportedly let Kyle Walker leave on a free transfer in January if...

arts.ttl: The Bundesliga is Manchester City’s James McAtee most likely destination
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano reports that the Bundesliga is the most likely destination for Manchester City midfielder James McAtee with a host of clubs interested. Bayer Leverkusen, Borussia Dortmund, RB Leipzig, VfB Stuttgart…

arts.ttl: Player fancies transfer to Manchester City or Manchester United – Not keen on other Premier League options
arts.sum: Earlier this month, claims from Italy talked about Manchester City and Manchester United as options for Juventus’ Douglas Luiz in the winter market. On January 6th, Tuttosport reported Pep Guardiola likes Luiz, who was at Manchester City between 2017and 2019. Three days later, Calciomercato.it stated the midfielder’s agent, Kia Joorabchian, floated the idea of taking his The post Player fancies transfer to Manchester City or Manchester United – Not keen on other Premier League options appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Contract talks ongoing with Brentford star Norgaard
arts.sum: Thomas Frank has confirmed that contract talks between Brentford and Christian Norgaard are ongoing. The midfielder’s current deal expires this summer. Bees head coach Frank said: “We are in dialogue with Christian. “Christian is happy here and we’re happy with him, so let’s see.” Frank also insisted that Kevin Schade is happy at Brentford and […] The post Contract talks ongoing with Brentford star Norgaard appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Sources: Kyle Walker has decided his next step after leaving Man City as Real Madrid and Bayern show interest
arts.sum: Kyle Walker has made his decision now 🚨✅

Thomas Frank has insisted that Kevin Schade is happy at Brentford and the club have no intention of selling. The German forward, 23, has recently been linked with Borussia Dortmund. arts.ttl: Insinuation star may even be off to Manchester City tomorrow – Things could go quickly
arts.sum: Over the past week or so, there’s been repeated claims of Manchester City interest in Eintracht Frankfurt’s Omar Marmoush. On Thursday, Eintracht Frankfurt manager Dino Toppmöller stated Manchester City haven’t made direct contact for the striker. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man City expect to complete £80m worth of signings in coming days, talks ongoing over a third deal
Five Bundesliga clubs enquire for Man City hat-trick hero
arts.sum: Five Bundesliga teams have made enquiries into the availability of Manchester City midfielder James McAtee this month. McAtee has been linked with an exit this month after failing to nail down a regular role in Pep Guardiola’s plans.
